1.title: Share the Love
1.description: This lovely badge was earned by users who shared their favorite Twitch clips in February 2025.

1.title: Raging Wolf Helm
1.description: This badge was earned for watching Elden Ring during the initial Shadow of the Erdtree Expansion launch!
